---
title: "Building Custom Solvers in R"
short-title: "Custom Solvers"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Lemke-Howson, support enumeration, and fictitious play implemented from scratch."
keywords: ["Lemke-Howson", "support enumeration", "fictitious play", "solver"]
---

# Custom Solvers {#sec-custom-solvers}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
